prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为565→363→366→432→340名，2025年回升至近年最低点（340名），较2024年（432名）前移约92名，显示2025年报考热度明显回 升。近5年位次波动较大，整体在340–565名区间震荡；2021–2026年物理类计划人数分别为36→32→32→33→34→35人，2026年计划35人，较2025年（34人）扩招1人 （+2.9%），扩幅较小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续6年稳居第3名，仅次于清华、北大，属于 国内顶尖高校阵营；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端、校园安全等事件，但抖音热度排名第14（高热），综合曝光度极高。2025年声誉评价为 中性/混合，整体舆情对顶尖高校报考意愿影响有限；拥有39个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、光学工程、数学等11个学 科获评A+，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业均为高热推荐，社会热度持续走高；福建省2026年 普通高考总人数约26.79万人，较2025年（约25.23万人）增加约1.56万人（+6.2%），按历史比例估算物理类考生约20.39万人，较2025年（19.21万人）增加约1.18万人，竞争加 剧。，2025年物理类本科批441分、特殊类型招生控制线520分；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，与福建省相 邻，地理距离较近，交通便利，对福建考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升至近年低位（340名）、2026年小幅扩招（+1人）及福建省物理类考生增加 约6.1%等因素，扩招对位次有轻微后移作用，但考生规模扩大加剧竞争，同时浙大顶尖学科实力和持续高热的社会关注度支撑位次维持高位。预计2026年物理类最低位次约356名 ，区间313–399名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 565 → 363 → 366 → 432 → 340, with 2025 rebounding to the lowest point in recent years (340), moving forward approximately 92 places compared to 2024 (432), indicating a significant recovery in application popularity in 2025. Rankings have fluctuated considerably over the past five years, oscillating within the 340–565 range. From 2021 to 2026, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category are 36 → 32 → 32 → 33 → 34 → 35, with 2026 planning 35 students, an increase of 1 student (+2.9%) compared to 2025 (34), a small expansion with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 3rd consecutively for six years from 2021 to 2026 in the Soft Science China University Rankings, behind only Tsinghua and Peking University, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents of academic misconduct and campus safety, but it ranks 14th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high overall exposure. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, and overall public opinion has limited impact on the willingness to apply to top universities. It has 39 A- or above disciplines, including 11 A+ disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, and Mathematics, with top-tier disciplinary strength nationally, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended with sustained social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Fujian Province general college entrance examination is approximately 267,900, an increase of about 15,600 (+6.2%) compared to 2025 (approximately 252,300). Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 203,900 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 11,800 from 2025 (192,100), intensifying competition. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 441 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 520 points. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, adjacent to Fujian Province, with close geographical distance and convenient transportation, exerting strong regional appeal to Fujian candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the rebound of 2025 rankings to a recent low (340), the small enrollment expansion in 2026 (+1 student), and the approximately 6.1% increase in Fujian Physics Category candidates, the expansion slightly pushes rankings backward, but the larger candidate pool intensifies competition. Meanwhile, Zhejiang University's top disciplinary strength and sustained high social attention support maintaining high rankings. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 356, with a range of 313–399.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (313–399), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Turing Class/Mixed Class) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<313), you can focus on targeting various special classes of Chu Kochen Honors College. If your ranking is close to the upper bound (>399), it is recommended to primarily target Tier 3 majors, and after entering Zhejiang University, transfer to your desired direction through internal selection.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for History Category were 169 → 180 → 193 → 182 → 203 respectively, showing a gradual backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 34 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 203, the highest ranking number in recent years (easiest to enter); from 2021 to 2026, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 15 → 15 → 17 → 17 → 20 → 21, with 21 planned for 2026, an increase of 1 student (+5%) compared to 2025 (20), a moderate expansion that has a certain backward effect on rankings.
3. [School Level] Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 3rd in the Soft Science rankings for 6 consecutive years, belonging to the top domestic universities, and also has a strong attraction for high-scoring History Category candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but the Douyin popularity ranking is 14th (high heat), with extremely high overall exposure; History Category enrollment majors are mainly humanities and social sciences, less affected by academic misconduct-related public opinion; Foreign Language and Literature A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Law A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, etc., with strong strength in humanities and social sciences, outstanding attraction for top liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other majors have relatively high social popularity recommendations; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Fujian Province in 2026 is about 267,900, with an estimated 64,000 History Category candidates based on historical proportions, an increase of about 3,700 (+6.2%) compared to 2025 (60,300), slightly intensifying competition; in 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch score is 450, and the special type enrollment control line is 531; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, adjacent to Fujian Province, with convenient transportation, and has a strong regional attraction for Fujian History Category candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recent continuous backward trend of History Category rankings, the expansion of 1 student in 2026 (+5%), and the increase of about 6.2% in Fujian History Category candidates, the effects of expansion and candidate increase basically offset each other, but Zhejiang University's top reputation and academic strength support the rankings. It is predicted that the lowest ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 216, with a range of 190–242.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (190–242), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Economics and Management/Foreign Languages) as the main direction, Tier 1 (Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Science Experimental Class/Smart Finance Innovation Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Humanities Experimental Class/Public Administration) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<190), focus on sprinting for Chu Kochen Honors College special classes; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>242), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, and then broaden development paths through minor programs or major transfers within Zhejiang University.
